title: PayloadFrame
description: Transport envelope wrapping every Socket.IO app event payload. All agent and hub app events must carry their logical payload inside this frame.

schemaVersion.description: Frame schema version (e.g. '1.0'). Receivers must reject unknown major versions.

enc.description: Encoding of the logical payload before compression.

cmp.description: Compression algorithm applied to the encoded payload. 'none' means no compression.

contentType.description: MIME type of the original (uncompressed, decoded) payload.

originalSize.description: Size in bytes of the payload before compression (equals compressedSize when cmp='none').

compressedSize.description: Size in bytes of the payload after compression.

payload.description: The encoded (and optionally compressed) payload. May be a base64 string, binary buffer, or structured JSON depending on transport and encoding.

traceId.description: Optional trace ID for distributed tracing correlation.

requestId.description: Optional request ID matching the JSON-RPC 'id' of the contained request or response.

signature.description: Optional HMAC transport-level signature for payload integrity verification.
